name: Coconut-Filled Layer Cake
recipeIngredient: Coconut filling; see recipe for details
Easy cocoa frosting; see recipe for details
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:15
1. Cream the shortening in a large bowl.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating well at medium speed of an electric mixer.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt; add to creamed mixture alternately with milk, beginning and ending with the flour mixture. Mix after each addition.
5. Stir in vanilla extract.
6. Pour batter into two greased and floured 9-inch round cake pans.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool in pans for 10 minutes; then remove from pans and let cool completely on wire racks.
9. Split cake layers horizontally.
10. Place half of one cake layer, cut side up, on a serving plate.
11. Spread one-third of the Coconut Filling evenly over the layer.
12. Repeat with the second and third layers.
13. Place the remaining layer, cut side down, on top of the cake.
14. Spread Easy Cocoa Frosting over the top and sides of the cake.
Yield: One 4-layer cake.
